Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1173 "DANDY-3400-1173" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dandy.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $3400 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
